js.detail: const id=env.get('movieId');const url=`${env.baseUrl}${id}`;const $=utils_1.kitty.load(await(0,utils_1.req)(url));const title=$('.title').text().trim();const cover=$('.stui-content__thumb img').attr('src');const desc=$('.stui-content__desc').text().trim();let videos=[];$('.stui-content__playlist li').each((i,el)=>{const name=$(el).find('.copy_text').text().trim();const playUrl=$(el).find('.hidden-xs').text().trim().replace('$','');videos.push({name,playUrl});});return{title,cover,desc,playlist:[{title:'dbm3u8',videos}]};
